Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kahn Mala]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Kahn Mala is an Archlady whose spirit feels like blood and poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Kahn Mala has a Shadow in the shape of a cobra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kahn Mala is Red Faith's Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kahn Mala pours a shining green elixir over the Sage.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Kahn Mala is of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Kahn Mala thanks Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Kahn Mala is an Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Kahn Mala's Blood Shadow takes the form of a cobra around her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is the former cult leader of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is a Matriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is called Daughter of Dread by the Stormcallers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is an Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Kahn Mala is a Lord who bows to Larian.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
